name: extract_settlement_notes_features
description: Extract structured features from settlement adjuster notes for final claim resolution and cost validation

structured_features.description: Structured features from settlement adjuster notes

settlement_amount.description: Final settlement amount agreed upon in dollars

time_to_closure_days.description: Total days from incident to claim closure

total_medical_costs.description: Total actual medical costs incurred in dollars

total_wage_loss.description: Total actual wage loss/indemnity paid in dollars

administrative_costs.description: Administrative, legal, and case management costs in dollars

total_incurred_cost.description: Total actual costs incurred (medical + wage loss + administrative) in dollars

cost_development_vs_reserves.description: How actual costs developed compared to initial reserves: higher (exceeded reserves), lower (under reserves), as_expected (matched reserves)

negotiation_position_strength.description: Strength of negotiation position: strong (favorable leverage), moderate (balanced), weak (unfavorable position)

claim_stability.description: Stability of claim development: stable (predictable progression), volatile (unpredictable changes)

litigation_risk.description: Risk of litigation or legal action

medical_complications.description: Medical complications encountered: none (no complications), minor (manageable issues), major (significant complications)

rtw_success.description: Return to work outcome: successful (full return), partial (limited capacity), failed (unable to return)

claim_development_speed.description: Speed of claim development: fast (quick resolution), average (typical timeline), slow (prolonged development)

reserve_adequacy.description: Whether initial reserves were adequate for actual costs

closure_likelihood.description: Likelihood of claim closure in near term

total_indemnity_paid.description: Total indemnity/wage loss paid in dollars (same as total_wage_loss)

legal_fees.description: Legal and defense costs in dollars

subrogation_recovery.description: Amount recovered through subrogation in dollars

actual_vs_reserve.description: Actual costs compared to initial reserve: under_reserve (costs below reserve), at_reserve (matched reserve), over_reserve (costs exceeded reserve)

reserve_adequacy_percentage.description: Percentage of reserve utilized (e.g., 85 = 85% of reserve used)

negotiation_rounds.description: Number of negotiation rounds to reach settlement

settlement_probability_initial.description: Initial settlement probability assessment at beginning of negotiations

return_to_work_capacity.description: Capacity of return to work if achieved

permanent_disability_final.description: Final permanent disability rating (e.g., '15% permanent partial', '10% whole person impairment')

cost_drivers.description: Primary factors that drove overall claim costs

lessons_learned.description: Key lessons learned from claim handling for future improvement

narrative_analysis.description: Rich text analysis (600-1200 characters) covering: (1) Settlement outcome, final amount, and rationale for resolution, (2) Actual costs compared to initial projections and reserve adequacy, (3) Key factors influencing final resolution (medical, legal, cooperation), (4) Claim development patterns and handling effectiveness, (5) Lessons learned and recommendations for future similar claims

overall_confidence.description: Confidence in extracted settlement information (typically high for final documentation)

data_quality.description: Quality and completeness of settlement documentation

missing_information.description: Any missing settlement details or incomplete information
